problem: Home health and hospice agencies face complex billing requirements with PDGM, OASIS documentation, and high denial rates that create cash flow uncertainty and revenue leakage.
solution: HealthRev Partners provides technology-enabled revenue cycle management services for home health and hospice agencies, including certified coding, billing services, and the Velocity analytics platform. They combine AI-assisted workflows with human expertise to achieve 98.7% first-pass accuracy and reduce denials by up to 40%.
